rationale: The cited paper examines low-fat label effects on calorie underestimation, serving-size inferences, and overeating, which directly overlaps with the citing paper’s core focus on calorie-estimation bias, health/vice-virtue categorization, and policy context around obesity. This looks plausibly like substantive prior work (theory/mechanism/comparison) rather than a generic background mention. The reference match is an exact DOI match to 10.1509/jmkr.43.4.605.
